title: Costa Coffee India Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)
company: Costa Coffee India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Costa Coffee India Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Costa Coffee India Asia Pacific Associates in Kanpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Costa Coffee India Asia Pacific Associates:
Costa Coffee India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Costa Coffee India Asia Pacific Associates!
